user.title: Severn Trent Water
user.description: Enter your Severn Trent account email address. You will receive a magic link email to authenticate.

magic_link.title: Enter Magic Link
magic_link.description: Check your email ({email}) for a magic link from Severn Trent. Paste the full URL or just the token here.

account_selection.title: Select Account
account_selection.description: You have {num_accounts} Severn Trent accounts. Please select which one to monitor.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your authentication has expired. Click Submit to receive a new magic link at {email}.

reauth_magic_link.title: Enter Magic Link
reauth_magic_link.description: Check your email ({email}) for the new magic link. Paste it here to re-authenticate.

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. The magic link may have expired or is invalid.
error.invalid_magic_link: Invalid magic link format. Please paste the full URL or the 64-character token.
error.cannot_send_email: Failed to send magic link email. Please check your email address and try again.
error.no_accounts: No Severn Trent accounts found for this login
error.cannot_fetch_meters: Could not fetch meter information. Please contact support.

abort.reauth_failed: Re-authentication failed. Please remove and re-add the integration.
